rubric: marketing-content-reviewer 6-dimension quality rubric (see /mkt commands' review step). Brand-voice lens: confident-but-honest mentor; Vietnamese-first; specific (approved) numbers only; admits trade-offs; correct per-segment preset (Students = peer 'bạn'; Professionals = respectful 'anh/chị'). See context/brand-voice.md.
howToRun: For each brief: run the matching /mkt command (or marketing-copywriter), then grade the OUTPUT with marketing-content-reviewer. Record the score in grading.json. Baseline target: mean >= 7.5, none < 6.

cases.brief: Zalo OA hook for the summer-intensive window: motivate a high-schooler at band 5.5 targeting 6.5 for university admission. CTA: free level test. Peer 'bạn' tone.
Short FB post for a working adult who needs IELTS for a promotion but has no time for fixed classes. CTA: book a consult. Respectful 'anh/chị' tone.
Reassure a parent comparing PrepEdu to a center for their child: lead with verifiable proof + the guarantee's eligibility terms, not hype. CTA: free consult.
Address 'is online as good as a center?' honestly — admit a trade-off and turn it into PrepEdu's edge (AI feedback + roadmap). No superlatives, no unverified numbers.
